message:
perf: Reduce default stack/heap for faster cold start (109ms→19ms instantiation)

- Stack: 128MB → 8MB (sufficient for most JS)
- Heap: 2GB → 256MB (covers QuickJS + typical workloads)
- Cold start improved from ~150ms to ~37ms

Users needing more memory can configure via .edgebox.json:
{"runtime": {"stack_size": 134217728, "heap_size": 2147483648}}
